auth.signupDescription: Start by entering some basic information.
auth.name: Name
auth.emailFormatError: Please enter a valid email address
auth.passwordRequirements: 8 characters or more, less than 24 characters, combination of English and numbers
auth.signupSuccessDescription: Your account has been created. Please log in.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you requested does not exist or has been moved.

workspaces.invitationCodeDescription: Enter the 12-character alphanumeric code received from the administrator.
workspaces.joinWithInvitationCodeFailed: Failed to join with invitation code
workspaces.joinInviteCodeUnknownError: An unknown error occurred. Please try again later

joinInviteCodeErrors.AUTH_401_001: Login is required or your session has expired
joinInviteCodeErrors.WORKSPACE_404_001: No active workspace matches this invitation code
joinInviteCodeErrors.WORKSPACE_JOIN_REQUEST_409_001: You are already a member of this workspace
joinInviteCodeErrors.WORKSPACE_JOIN_REQUEST_409_002: Unable to process the join request. Please try again later
joinInviteCodeErrors.INTERNAL_500_001: A server error occurred. Please try again later

workspaces.invitationCodeShareDescription: Copy the code below to invite your team members to the workspace.

myPage.title: My page
myPage.profileImageInvalidType: Only JPEG, PNG, and GIF images can be uploaded
myPage.profileImageTooLarge: Please choose an image that is 3MB or smaller

members.title: Members
members.description: Manage the members and roles of your workspace.

settings.title: Workspace settings
settings.workspaceDeleteDescription: Deleting this workspace will permanently remove all tasks, comments, and settings. This action cannot be undone.
settings.workspaceDeleteConfirmDescription: Deleting "{workspaceName}" will permanently remove all data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.workspaceWithdrawDescription: If you leave this workspace, you will no longer have access to its tasks, comments, or settings.
settings.workspaceWithdrawConfirmDescription: You will no longer have access to "{workspaceName}" after leaving.
settings.workspaceWithdrawUnknownError: An unknown error occurred. Please try again later

workspaceWithdrawErrors.AUTH_401_001: Login is required or your session has expired
workspaceWithdrawErrors.AUTH_403_001: There is no admin available to receive ownership transfer
workspaceWithdrawErrors.INTERNAL_500_001: A server error occurred. Please try again later
